# AutoLeadss

> Done-for-you lead generation and sales automation for businesses in the UAE and Egypt — landing pages, ads, social media, and AI chatbots working together as a 24/7 sales machine.

AutoLeadss builds full marketing funnels (not just ads) for e-commerce, real estate, and service businesses in the UAE, the wider Gulf, and Egypt. Bilingual (Arabic + English) team. Clients own all ad accounts and creative assets. Pricing for the done-for-you agency service is scoped per engagement on a free strategy call — no fixed published rate.

AutoLeadss also runs a separate self-serve product, an AI funnel builder, with published starting prices at [/pricing](/pricing): from $59/mo (Gulf) or 1,500 EGP/mo (Egypt) for the Starter plan.

## Pages

- [Home (English)](/en): Overview of services, process, and FAQs.
- [Home (Arabic)](/ar): النسخة العربية — نظرة عامة على الخدمات والعملية والأسئلة الشائعة.
- [Home (Franco-Arabic)](/fr-eg): Casual Egyptian Arabic written in the Latin chat alphabet ("Franco"/Arabizi).
- [Self-serve pricing](/pricing): Published plan pricing for the AI funnel builder.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of indexable routes.
